creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text: Hi. I wanted to install Steam using linuxulator-steam-utils and in it's README, it says this about native wine-proton "only major.minor numbers have to match" and in Steam, there is Proton 9.0-4 which is one minor release newer than this port's version. I tried updating the port to 9.0.4 release but it got failed in build stage. Here is the my .diff file and build log. Thanks in advance and sorry if i shouldn't have opened this bug report, please excuse my ignorance.
